sentences.target: Mein Enkel kommt heute nach der Schule.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈɛŋkl̩ kɔmt ˈhɔɪ̯tə naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Mein Enkel kommt heute nach der Schule.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈɛŋkl̩ kɔmt ˈhɔɪ̯tə naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: My grandson is coming after school today.
translations.es: Mi nieto viene hoy después de la escuela.
translations.fr: Mon petit-fils vient aujourd'hui après l'école.
translations.it: Mio nipote viene oggi dopo la scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我孙子今天放学后会来。
translations.ru: Мой внук сегодня придёт после школы.
translations.pt: Meu neto vem hoje depois da escola.
translations.he: הנכד שלי מגיע היום אחרי בית הספר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cháu trai tôi sẽ đến sau giờ học.
translations.nl: Mijn kleinzoon komt vandaag na school.
translations.uk: Мій онук сьогодні прийде після школи.
translations.hu: Az unokám ma iskola után jön.
translations.hi: मेरा पोता आज स्कूल के बाद आएगा.
translations.pl: Mój wnuk przyjdzie dziś po szkole.
translations.el: Ο εγγονός μου θα έρθει σήμερα μετά το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Barnebarnet mitt kommer i dag etter skolen.
translations.id: Cucuku datang hari ini setelah sekolah.
translations.sv: Mitt barnbarn kommer idag efter skolan.
translations.ro: Nepotul meu vine azi după școală.
translations.cs: Můj vnuk dnes přijde po škole.
translations.da: Mit barnebarn kommer i dag efter skole.
translations.ja: 今日は孫が学校の後に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner marking first-person singular possessor; agrees with masculine nominative singular 'Enkel' and forms the subject NP.
Noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); head of the clause (V2).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition meaning 'after' (temporal); governs dative and introduces the PP.
Definite article in dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Schule' as complement of 'nach'.
Noun in dative singular feminine; object of the preposition 'nach' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Sie holt ihren Enkel am Bahnhof ab.
sentences.reading: /ziː hoːlt ˈiːʁən ˈɛŋkl̩ am ˈbaːnhoːf ap/

translations.de: Sie holt ihren Enkel am Bahnhof ab.
translations.ipa: /ziː hoːlt ˈiːʁən ˈɛŋkl̩ am ˈbaːnhoːf ap/
translations.en: She is picking up her grandson at the station.
translations.es: Ella va a recoger a su nieto en la estación.
translations.fr: Elle va chercher son petit-fils à la gare.
translations.it: Va a prendere suo nipote alla stazione.
translations.ru: Она заберёт своего внука на вокзале.
translations.pt: Ela vai buscar o neto na estação.
translations.he: היא אוספת את הנכד שלה בתחנה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy sẽ đón cháu trai ở ga.
translations.nl: Ze haalt haar kleinzoon op bij het station.
translations.uk: Вона зустріне свого онука на вокзалі.
translations.hi: वह स्टेशन पर अपने पोते को लेने जा रही है.
translations.pl: Ona odbierze swojego wnuka na dworcu.
translations.el: Θα πάει να πάρει τον εγγονό της από τον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Hun henter barnebarnet sitt på stasjonen.
translations.id: Dia akan menjemput cucunya di stasiun.
translations.sv: Hon ska hämta sitt barnbarn på stationen.
translations.ro: Ea își ia nepotul de la gară.
translations.da: Hun henter sit barnebarn på stationen.
translations.ja: 彼女は駅に孫を迎えに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); part of the separable verb 'abholen'; occupies V2 position.
Possessive determiner; accusative singular masculine agreeing with 'Enkel' as direct object.
Noun in accusative singular; direct object (person being fetched).
Contracted preposition ('an dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Noun in dative singular; object of the preposition 'am' (locative complement).
Separable verb particle; forms the verb 'abholen' with 'holt'; placed clause-final due to separable-prefix syntax.

sentences.target: Unser Enkel malt mir ein buntes Bild.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ ˈɛŋkl̩ maːlt miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈbʊntəs bɪlt/

translations.de: Unser Enkel malt mir ein buntes Bild.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ ˈɛŋkl̩ maːlt miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈbʊntəs bɪlt/
translations.en: Our grandson is painting me a colorful picture.
translations.es: Nuestro nieto me está haciendo un dibujo de colores.
translations.fr: Notre petit-fils me fait un dessin coloré.
translations.it: Nostro nipote mi sta facendo un disegno colorato.
translations.ko: 우리 손자가 나한테 알록달록한 그림을 그리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们孙子在给我画一幅彩色的画。
translations.yue: 我哋個孫而家畫緊一幅色彩繽紛嘅畫畀我。
translations.ru: Наш внук рисует мне яркий рисунок.
translations.pt: Nosso neto está fazendo um desenho bem colorido para mim.
translations.he: הנכד שלנו מצייר לי ציור צבעוני.
translations.tr: Torunumuz bana renkli bir resim çiziyor.
translations.vi: Cháu trai của chúng tôi đang vẽ cho tôi một bức tranh nhiều màu.
translations.nl: Onze kleinzoon maakt een kleurrijke tekening voor mij.
translations.uk: Наш онук малює для мене яскравий малюнок.
translations.hu: Az unokánk színes rajzot rajzol nekem.
translations.hi: हमारा पोता मेरे लिए रंग-बिरंगी तस्वीर बना रहा है.
translations.pl: Nasz wnuk rysuje mi kolorowy obrazek.
translations.el: Ο εγγονός μας μου ζωγραφίζει μια πολύχρωμη ζωγραφιά.
translations.nb: Barnebarnet vårt tegner et fargerikt bilde til meg.
translations.id: Cucu kami sedang menggambar sebuah gambar berwarna untuk saya.
translations.sv: Vårt barnbarn ritar en färgglad bild till mig.
translations.ro: Nepotul nostru îmi face un desen colorat.
translations.cs: Náš vnuk mi kreslí barevný obrázek.
translations.da: Vores barnebarn tegner en farverig tegning til mig.
translations.ja: うちの孫が私に色とりどりの絵を描いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine agreeing with 'Enkel' as subject.
Noun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); transitive.
Personal pronoun in dative singular; indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner for 'Bild'.
Attributive adjective with -es ending; agrees with accusative singular neuter 'Bild'.
Noun in accusative singular; direct object/theme.

sentences.target: Ich lese meinem Enkel eine Geschichte vor.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈmaɪ̯nəm ˈɛŋkl̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ɡəˈʃɪçtə foːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich lese meinem Enkel eine Geschichte vor.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈmaɪ̯nəm ˈɛŋkl̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ɡəˈʃɪçtə foːɐ̯/
translations.en: I’m reading my grandson a story.
translations.es: Le estoy leyendo un cuento a mi nieto.
translations.fr: Je lis une histoire à mon petit-fils.
translations.it: Sto leggendo una storia a mio nipote.
translations.yue: 我喺度讀故事畀我孫聽。
translations.pt: Estou lendo uma história para o meu neto.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc truyện cho cháu trai nghe.
translations.nl: Ik lees mijn kleinzoon een verhaaltje voor.
translations.hi: मैं अपने पोते को कहानी पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω ένα παραμύθι στον εγγονό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en historie for barnebarnet mitt.
translations.id: Saya sedang membacakan cerita untuk cucu saya.
translations.sv: Jag läser en saga för mitt barnbarn.
translations.ro: Îi citesc o poveste nepotului meu.
translations.da: Jeg læser en historie for mit barnebarn.
translations.ja: 孫にお話を読んでいます。
